episodes.title: Cult Mascot to Self-Aware Observer
episodes.description:
Author of Confessions of a Sociopath M.E. Thomas and Crow talk about being raised in a cult, being prophesied to be the next faith healer Kathryn Kuhlman, autonomy, consent, BDSM, uterine health issues, rewards based or punishment based incentive systems, Baby Marie, diagnoses, and being transgender.

📖 PICK UP MY BOOK: http://www.sociopathworld.com/p/book.html
💻 MY OFFICIAL WEBSITE: http://www.sociopathworld.com/
